column1: # Pluribus pin annotation file — Sipeed Tang Nano (GW1N-1)
# GOWIN pad/IO recovery is NOT modelled yet: load.py's MachXO2-only
# pad_map/EFB/EBR blocks are gated by family, and the gowin lifter's pad hooks
# return empty.  So these rows are documentation only — they are not consumed
# on the gowin path (fabric_pins is computed but unused).  When gowin pad
# mapping lands, fill this out from the board schematic + apycula pinout.
# pin  row  col  pio  dir  label  function  confidence
# (Tang Nano reference pins — indicative only, not used by the gowin lifter.)
